impact: JSONB key checks per row × 6 kandidaten × N contracten in T-029 orchestrator = N+1 pattern. Batch variant filed als ISS.

title: [performance] JSONB key checks per row × 6 kandidaten × N contracten in T-029 orchestrator = N
